Query.SQL: SELECT CP.CODE AS "CP.CODE" , NP.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME AS "NP.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME" , NP.PARTY_ID AS "NP.PARTY_ID" , NP.COMPANY_NAME AS "NP.COMPANY_NAME" , CP.ADMIN_COURT_CODE AS "CP.ADMIN_COURT_CODE" , NGA.ADDRESS_ID AS "NGA.ADDRESS_ID" , NGA.ADDRESS_LINE1 AS "NGA.ADDRESS_LINE1" , NGA.ADDRESS_LINE2 AS "NGA.ADDRESS_LINE2" , NGA.ADDRESS_LINE3 AS "NGA.ADDRESS_LINE3" , NGA.ADDRESS_LINE4 AS "NGA.ADDRESS_LINE4" , NGA.ADDRESS_LINE5 AS "NGA.ADDRESS_LINE5" , NGA.POSTCODE AS "NGA.POSTCODE" , NGA.UPDATED_BY AS "NGA.UPDATED_BY" , NP.DX_NUMBER AS "NP.DX_NUMBER" , NP.TEL_NO AS "NP.TEL_NO" , NP.FAX_NUMBER AS "NP.FAX_NUMBER" , NP.EMAIL_ADDRESS AS "NP.EMAIL_ADDRESS" , PP.PARTY_ID AS "PP.PARTY_ID" , PP.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME AS "PP.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME" , PGA.REFERENCE AS "PGA.REFERENCE" , PGA.ADDRESS_ID AS "PGA.ADDRESS_ID" , PGA.ADDRESS_LINE1 AS "PGA.ADDRESS_LINE1" , PGA.ADDRESS_LINE2 AS "PGA.ADDRESS_LINE2" , PGA.ADDRESS_LINE3 AS "PGA.ADDRESS_LINE3" , PGA.ADDRESS_LINE4 AS "PGA.ADDRESS_LINE4" , PGA.ADDRESS_LINE5 AS "PGA.ADDRESS_LINE5" , PGA.POSTCODE AS "PGA.POSTCODE" , PGA.UPDATED_BY AS "PGA.UPDATED_BY" , PP.DX_NUMBER AS "PP.DX_NUMBER" , PP.TEL_NO AS "PP.TEL_NO" , PP.FAX_NUMBER AS "PP.FAX_NUMBER" , PP.EMAIL_ADDRESS AS "PP.EMAIL_ADDRESS" , PY.BANK_NAME AS "PY.BANK_NAME" , PY.BANK_ACC_NO AS "PY.BANK_ACC_NO" , PY.BANK_SORT_CODE AS "PY.BANK_SORT_CODE" , PY.ACC_HOLDER AS "PY.ACC_HOLDER" , PY.BANK_INFO_1 AS "PY.BANK_INFO_1" , PY.BANK_INFO_2 AS "PY.BANK_INFO_2" , PY.GIRO_ACC_NO AS "PY.GIRO_ACC_NO" , PY.GIRO_TRANS_CODE_1 AS "PY.GIRO_TRANS_CODE_1" , PY.GIRO_TRANS_CODE_2 AS "PY.GIRO_TRANS_CODE_2" , PY.APACS_TRANS_CODE AS "PY.APACS_TRANS_CODE" , NCP.WRT_NO_FROM AS "NCP.WRT_NO_FROM" , NCP.WRT_NO_TO AS "NCP.WRT_NO_TO" , NCP.PRINT_JUDGMENTS AS "NCP.PRINT_JUDGMENTS" , NCP.DUPLEX AS "NCP.DUPLEX" , NCP.DEF_PAPER_TYPE AS "NCP.DEF_PAPER_TYPE" , NCP.ADM_PAPER_TYPE AS "NCP.ADM_PAPER_TYPE" , NCP.LAST_JG_SEQ AS "NCP.LAST_JG_SEQ" , NCP.LAST_PD_SEQ AS "NCP.LAST_PD_SEQ" , NCP.LAST_WT_SEQ AS "NCP.LAST_WT_SEQ" , NCP.LAST_DEF_SEQ AS "NCP.LAST_DEF_SEQ" , NCP.LAST_ADM_SEQ AS "NCP.LAST_ADM_SEQ" , CLP.PARTY_ID AS "CLP.PARTY_ID" , CLP.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME AS "CLP.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME" , CLGA.ADDRESS_ID AS "CLGA.ADDRESS_ID" , CLGA.ADDRESS_LINE1 AS "CLGA.ADDRESS_LINE1" , CLGA.ADDRESS_LINE2 AS "CLGA.ADDRESS_LINE2" , CLGA.ADDRESS_LINE3 AS "CLGA.ADDRESS_LINE3" , CLGA.ADDRESS_LINE4 AS "CLGA.ADDRESS_LINE4" , CLGA.ADDRESS_LINE5 AS "CLGA.ADDRESS_LINE5" , CLGA.POSTCODE AS "CLGA.POSTCODE" , CLGA.UPDATED_BY AS "CLGA.UPDATED_BY" , CLP.DX_NUMBER AS "CLP.DX_NUMBER" , CLP.TEL_NO AS "CLP.TEL_NO" , CLP.FAX_NUMBER AS "CLP.FAX_NUMBER" , CLP.EMAIL_ADDRESS AS "CLP.EMAIL_ADDRESS" , 'CP' AS "CP_TABLE_ALIAS" , 'PGA' AS "PGA_TABLE_ALIAS" , 'PY' AS "PY_TABLE_ALIAS" , 'PP' AS "PP_TABLE_ALIAS" , 'NCP' AS "NCP_TABLE_ALIAS" , 'NGA' AS "NGA_TABLE_ALIAS" , 'CLP' AS "CLP_TABLE_ALIAS" , 'CLGA' AS "CLGA_TABLE_ALIAS" , CP.ORA_ROWSCN AS "CP_ORA_ROWSCN" , NP.ORA_ROWSCN AS "NP_ORA_ROWSCN" , NGA.ORA_ROWSCN AS "NGA_ORA_ROWSCN" , NCP.ORA_ROWSCN AS "NCP_ORA_ROWSCN" , P2P.ORA_ROWSCN AS "P2P_ORA_ROWSCN" , PP.ORA_ROWSCN AS "PP_ORA_ROWSCN" , PGA.ORA_ROWSCN AS "PGA_ORA_ROWSCN" , PY.ORA_ROWSCN AS "PY_ORA_ROWSCN" , CLP2P.ORA_ROWSCN AS "CLP2P_ORA_ROWSCN" , CLP.ORA_ROWSCN AS "CLP_ORA_ROWSCN" , CLGA.ORA_ROWSCN AS "CLGA_ORA_ROWSCN" FROM CODED_PARTIES CP , PARTIES NP , GIVEN_ADDRESSES NGA , NATIONAL_CODED_PARTIES NCP , PARTY_TO_PARTY_RELATIONSHIP P2P , PARTIES PP , GIVEN_ADDRESSES PGA , PAYEES PY , PARTY_TO_PARTY_RELATIONSHIP CLP2P , PARTIES CLP , GIVEN_ADDRESSES CLGA WHERE CP.ADMIN_COURT_CODE = ${param.courtCode} AND CP.CODE = ${param.codedPartyCode} AND NP.PARTY_ID = CP.PARTY_ID AND NGA.PARTY_ID = CP.PARTY_ID AND NGA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE = 'CODED PARTY' AND NCP.CODE (+)= CP.CODE AND P2P.PARTY_A_ROLE_CODE (+)= 'SOLICITOR' AND P2P.PARTY_A_ID (+)= CP.PARTY_ID AND P2P.PARTY_B_ROLE_CODE (+)= 'NCP PAYEE' AND PP.PARTY_ID (+)= P2P.PARTY_B_ID AND PGA.PARTY_ID (+)= P2P.PARTY_B_ID AND PGA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE (+)= 'NCP PAYEE' AND PY.PARTY_ID (+)= P2P.PARTY_B_ID AND CLP2P.PARTY_A_ROLE_CODE (+)= 'SOLICITOR' AND CLP2P.PARTY_A_ID (+)= CP.PARTY_ID AND CLP2P.PARTY_B_ROLE_CODE (+)= 'CLAIMANT' AND CLP.PARTY_ID (+)= CLP2P.PARTY_B_ID AND CLGA.PARTY_ID (+)= CLP2P.PARTY_B_ID AND CLGA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE (+)= 'SERVICE'
